nasb.text: When they saw that there was much money in the chest, the king’s scribe and the high priest came up and tied it in bags and counted the money which was found in the house of the Lord.

esv.text: And whenever they saw that there was much money in the chest, the king’s secretary and the high priest came up and they bagged and counted the money that was found in the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們看見箱內的銀子多起來的時候，就叫王的書記和大祭司上來，他們就數點在耶和華殿裡所得的銀子，裝在袋中。

ccb.text: 箱子里的银子多了，王的书记和大祭司就把银子点好，装在袋子里。
